problem id: cebaa9b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3)

examples:
  01010011 -> 10011000
  01001001 -> 01001000
  01101011 -> 01011000
  01001000 -> 01000000
  01011110 -> 11110000
  10100100 -> 00100000
  11101110 -> 01110000
  10110011 -> 10011000
  10000111 -> 00111000
  10110100 -> 10100000

query: 00110011
predicted answer: 10011000
